blockers.description: Testing was paused at the user's request while changing locations.

human_actions_pending.context: The active make ci process was interrupted cleanly during bench-check.

decisions.decision: Amend the save gate to order-balanced geometric-p50 additive overhead of at most 0.5 ms at 1k, 10k, and 50k.
decisions.rationale: Two independent reviews found no safe narrow optimization capable of removing the roughly 0.3 ms constant SQLite projection cost; metadata remains O(changed-file), the existing O(N) curve is not worsened, and feature semantics are unchanged.

decisions.decision: Run Trash-dependent tests with normal macOS permissions.
decisions.rationale: The restricted sandbox produced only system-Trash permission failures; the same tests passed with normal access.

decisions.decision: Do not push until a fresh cumulative branch red-team approves, then monitor CI and Codoki every 90 seconds until explicitly safe to merge.
decisions.rationale: This is the user's required release gate for every milestone PR.
